mapper.select: SELECT ntc_oid, ntc_nm, ntc_cn, ntc_cn_txt, bgng_dt, end_dt, upend_fix_yn, open_yn, use_yn, inq_cnt, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.ntc WHERE ntc_oid = #{ntc_oid}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ${schema}.ntc( ntc_nm, ntc_cn, ntc_cn_txt, bgng_dt,
end_dt,
upend_fix_yn, open_yn, use_yn, inq_cnt, reg_id, mdfcn_id ) VALUES ( #{ntcNm}, #{ntcCn}, #{ntcCnTxt}, #{bgngDt},
#{endDt},
'Y', #{openYn}, 'Y', 0, #{regId}, #{mdfcnId} )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
